title: MMi Daily Iron Ore Index Report November 27 2024
section_path: MMi Daily Iron Ore Index Report November 27 2024
section_path_text: MMi Daily Iron Ore Index Report November 27 2024
summary:
Main
in Chinese iron ore and steelmaking prices 27/11/2024
Today, iron ore ﬂuctuated upward, with the most-traded contract I2501 closing at 792 yuan, up 1.08% for the day. Traders were activelyselling, while steel mills remained cautious and had moderate purchase willingness. The market trading atmosphere was moderate.
